settings.hero_subheading: 100% OF DONATIONS GO DIRECTLY TO FAMILIES IN NEED
settings.who_title: WHO WE ARE / WHAT WE DO:
settings.who_text: We are a dedicated group of firefighters who have come together with a shared purpose — to make a meaningful difference in the lives of first responders and their communities. Our organization was founded by firefighters who understand the challenges and sacrifices that come with the profession. Driven by a deep sense of camaraderie and a commitment to the well-being of our fellow first responders, we have embarked on a mission to support those who are in need, providing assistance and resources when they need it most.
settings.mission_text_1: As firefighters ourselves, we are passionate in helping those in need. We are nothing short of determined to get the task at hand done. Right now, our task is to help those who have risked their life for every single one of us. We will stop at nothing to be our everyday hero in need gets the support they need. But we can’t do this without your help.
settings.mission_text_2: Please join us on our mission to helping our first responders get the aid they need when times get tough. Please help us support the families of those who’ve lost their hero. There are so many ways to get involved. Whether by donating, you can make a significant difference for so many. We donate every penny directly to the families in need. So you know your efforts are going exactly where they belong.
settings.impact_text: Our main focus is providing aid to first responders in tough situations. We trust in collective healing and understand that even a tiny donation can have a big effect. Through directing our resources, time, and effort, we intend to trigger a widespread positive transformation that goes beyond our immediate influence.
settings.cause_text: By supporting us, you’re not just helping a cause — you’re joining a movement. We believe in people’s goodness and their ability to make a difference. Your support unites us with firefighters and the community to create a safer, brighter future, honoring first responders and building a world where their sacrifices are always valued.
settings.donate_text: All Grill Rescue Foundation operation costs and salaries are paid 100% by Grill Rescue LLC, our products company. Therefore, absolutely no costs are accrued by the Grill Rescue Foundation allowing us to put 100% of all donations directly into the hands of the people who need it.
settings.helped_title: WHO WE HAVE HELPED IN THE PAST
settings.helped_button_label: CLICK HERE TO DONATE SO WE CAN CONTINUE HELP FIRST RESPONDERS FAMILIES LIKE THESE
settings.support_heading: A Call for Help After Nearby Tragedy
settings.support_text: This one hits very close to home for our firefighter-owned company. Based in South Florida ourselves, this unfortunate accident happened only 30 minutes from us. We're asking for donations to help the families in this extremely unfortunate situation. As always, 100% of donations go towards the families.
settings.overlay_1_text: Your donation can change lives. Join us in uplifting first responders who tirelessly safeguard our communities. Your support enables us to continue making a positive impact.
settings.overlay_2_text: Share our mission with your friends, family, and colleagues. Together, we amplify the reach of our support network and create a stronger safety net for our heroes.
